title: How a neighborhood holds steady together
summary: How a community's immune libraries together help everyone — including kids who can't be vaccinated yet. Trauma-informed register per ADR-016 SAMHSA TIP 57: community + caring + neighbors framing, NEVER panic / threat / blame. Kit ships as draftAwaitingReview placeholder until external reviewer signoff lands; consumer code filters via QuestionKitService.loadAllPhase3Kits().
